Local Sightseeing

Must-Visit Places in & Around Dharamshala

From spiritual McLeod Ganj to adventurous Triund — we'll take you everywhere.

McLeod Ganj

Little Lhasa of India

Cultural & Spiritual

The hub of Tibetan culture in India. Explore the Dalai Lama's temple, Tibetan markets, cozy cafes, and vibrant street life.

10 km from Dharamshala
  • Tsuglagkhang Complex (Dalai Lama Temple)
  • Tibetan market
  • Namgyal Monastery
  • Kotwali Bazaar
Book a Taxi to McLeod Ganj

Bhagsu Waterfall

A refreshing Himalayan cascade

Nature & Trekking

A short trek from Bhagsu village leads to this beautiful waterfall surrounded by forests. Perfect for a morning excursion.

3 km from McLeod Ganj
  • Bhagsu Nag Temple
  • Cafe culture
  • Photography spots
  • Short 1 km trek
Book a Taxi to Bhagsu Waterfall

Triund Trek Base

Gateway to the Dhauladhar Range

Adventure & Trekking

Drive up to Gallu Devi Temple and Dharamkot, then start the famous Triund trek with jaw-dropping mountain views.

6 km from McLeod Ganj
  • Triund hilltop camping
  • 360° Dhauladhar views
  • Gallu Devi Temple
  • Pine forest trail
Book a Taxi to Triund Trek Base

Dharamkot Village

Peaceful village above McLeod Ganj

Village & Nature

A quiet mountain village popular with yoga retreats and long-stay travellers. Stunning valley and forest views.

3 km from McLeod Ganj
  • Yoga & meditation centres
  • Himalayan views
  • Village walks
  • Sunset viewpoints
Book a Taxi to Dharamkot Village

Naddi Viewpoint

Best sunrise point in Dharamshala

Viewpoint & Nature

A 15-minute ride above McLeod Ganj offers panoramic views of the Dhauladhar range — especially magical at sunrise.

5 km from McLeod Ganj
  • Sunrise viewpoint
  • Dhauladhar peaks
  • Peaceful environment
  • Dal Lake below
Book a Taxi to Naddi Viewpoint

Kangra Fort

Ancient fort of the Katoch dynasty

Heritage & History

One of the oldest forts in the Himalayan region, dating back over 3500 years. Offers spectacular valley views.

20 km from Dharamshala
  • 3500+ year old fort
  • Panoramic Kangra valley views
  • Brajeshwari Temple nearby
  • History & architecture
Book a Taxi to Kangra Fort

Dal Lake Dharamshala

Serene Himalayan lake with pine views

Nature & Relaxation

A small, peaceful lake surrounded by deodar trees. Ideal for a quiet morning visit away from the McLeod Ganj crowds.

11 km from Dharamshala
  • Serene lake surroundings
  • Deodar pine forest
  • Shiva temple
  • Boating (seasonal)
Book a Taxi to Dal Lake Dharamshala

Bir Billing

Paragliding capital of Asia

Adventure Sports

Located 70 km from Dharamshala, Bir Billing is the world's second-best paragliding site. A popular day or overnight trip.

70 km from Dharamshala
  • Paragliding flights
  • Landing site at Bir village
  • Tibetan colony
  • Camping options
Book a Taxi to Bir Billing
